description: The MultiChannelSimplexTexture3D component creates a monochrome noise channel for each RGBA channel with their own settings. It is also considered a ITexture3D element.

fields.FilterMode: How to interpolate enlarged pixels when rendering the texture.
fields.AnisotropicLevel: Used when the texture is using the Anisotropic filtering render algorithm.
fields.WrapModeU: How to handle wrapping for UVW sampling positions beyond the 0 to 1 range for U.
fields.WrapModeV: How to handle wrapping for UVW sampling positions beyond the 0 to 1 range for V.
fields.WrapModeW: How to handle wrapping for UVW sampling positions beyond the 0 to 1 range for W.
fields.Profile: The color space to render the image in.
fields.Size: How big the texture is in pixels.
fields.Format: What format to show the texture in.
fields.R: The settings to use when generating the noise for the red channel.
fields.G: The settings to use when generating the noise for the green channel.
fields.B: The settings to use when generating the noise for the blue channel.
fields.A: The settings to use when generating the noise for the alpha channel.

usage: Can be used to make procedural noise 4D textures for use with LUT, and volume.
